name: koreapolicysim
description: KoreaPolicySim - A Seoul political and policy response simulation engine

scripts.setup: npm install && cd frontend && npm install
scripts.setup:backend: cd backend && if command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1; then uv sync; else python3 -m pip install -r requirements.txt; fi
scripts.setup:all: npm run setup && npm run setup:backend
scripts.backend: cd backend && if ! python3 -c "import flask" >/dev/null 2>&1; then python3 -m pip install -r requirements.txt; fi && if command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1; then uv run python run.py; else python3 run.py; fi
scripts.frontend: cd frontend && npm install --no-audit --no-fund vite@5.4.0 @vitejs/plugin-vue@5.0.4 --save-dev && npx vite --host
scripts.build: cd frontend && npm install --no-audit --no-fund vite@5.4.0 @vitejs/plugin-vue@5.0.4 --save-dev && npx vite build
